name: Iris
description: Camera-iris rings dilating through re-coloured bands on each redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 92%; height: 92%; margin: 4%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 22%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 42%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
